scripts.prebuild:staging: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && cross-env ELECTRON_ENV=staging node scripts/write-env.mjs && pnpm run prepare:assets
scripts.prebuild:production: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && cross-env ELECTRON_ENV=production node scripts/write-env.mjs && pnpm run prepare:assets
scripts.prepackage:staging: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && cross-env ELECTRON_ENV=staging node scripts/write-env.mjs && pnpm run prepare:assets
scripts.prepackage:production: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && cross-env ELECTRON_ENV=production node scripts/write-env.mjs && pnpm run prepare:assets
